name: Dogecoin Cash, Inc.
business: Dogecoin Cash, Inc. operates a technology-enabled telemedicine platform, PrestoDoctor, that facilitates medical cannabis evaluations conducted by licensed physicians in jurisdictions where permitted. The company generates substantially all of its revenue from telemedicine consultation services. It does not currently cultivate, distribute, or sell cannabis products.

exposures.sentence: The Company currently conducts its principal operations through its majority-owned subsidiary PrestoCorp, Inc., doing business as PrestoDoctor, which operates a telemedicine platform that connects patients with licensed physicians who conduct medical cannabis evaluations through secure video consultations in jurisdictions where such services are permitted under applicable state laws.
The Company maintains certain digital asset and blockchain-related initiatives through subsidiaries including DogeSPAC LLC, Meme Coins, Inc., and Dogecoin Treasury, Inc.
